## What's happening
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Deployment mode
- [ ] Self-hosted (Docker on VPS)
- [ ] Self-hosted (n8n Desktop)
- [ ] n8n Cloud

## Workflow affected
Which workflow is misbehaving (e.g., 02-evaluator, 01a-greenhouse-scanner)?

## AI Provider
- [ ] Google AI Studio (Gemma 4)
- [ ] OpenAI (GPT-5 mini)
- [ ] LM Studio
- [ ] Ollama
- [ ] OpenRouter

## What you tried
Steps you've already taken to debug.

## Error message / logs
Paste the n8n execution log error or any error messages.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots of the issue.
